text: Finding myself in this modern, glass-walled environment, I am drawn to the vibrant display inside marked 'R + D.' There is a sense of anticipation and curiosity—this space seems to celebrate innovation, knowledge, and the very act of questioning. Surrounded by exhibits and texts, I feel contemplative, aware of humanity's ongoing pursuit to connect, create, and understand. The mechanical and technological elements alongside written ideas evoke a deep reflection on how machines and humans now evolve together. My presence here feels purposeful, as if I am invited to ponder the origins of thought and the infinite capacity for discovery.
